key_albums: Bikini Kill EP (1992, Kill Rock Stars)
The CD Version of the First Two Records (1994)

theory_nodes.concept: Olympia geography as the engine's final geography: Evergreen State College (founded 1967, no grades, interdisciplinary) created the community infrastructure for riot grrrl; Calvin Johnson K Records IPU established DIY culture; Olympia is not Seattle's suburb but a distinct city with state government, Evergreen, and its own radical underground. The engine closes in Olympia, not Seattle.
theory_nodes.description: Olympia final geography -- Evergreen State College, K Records, distinct from Seattle.

theory_nodes.concept: Riot grrrl as political formation within punk (not genre): emerged simultaneously Olympia and Washington DC 1991; Bikini Kill zine and Girl Power pamphlet as founding documents before music; feminist critique of punk's structural misogyny (stage access, representation, exploitation); women to the front explicit show practice; 1992-1993 media blackout -- controlling representation rather than accepting mainstream frame.
theory_nodes.description: Riot grrrl -- political formation not genre, media blackout, founding documents.

theory_nodes.concept: E=10 origin-point calibration for Bikini Kill: origin-point status confirmed by (1) influence on Sleater-Kinney, Team Dresch, Heavens to Betsy and documented lineage; (2) riot grrrl movement origin -- no prior Pacific Northwest band in this specific formation; (3) Kathleen Hanna as singular vocal presence -- scream as semantic unit, direct address as compositional device, trained-as-rejection-of-training delivery; (4) historical consequence -- punk culture structure changed measurably.
theory_nodes.description: E=10 -- origin-point status, Kathleen Hanna singularity, historical consequence.

theory_nodes.concept: Kathleen Hanna biography: Olympia visual artist and zine producer before Bikini Kill band; Bikini Kill zine named before the band; vocal delivery as political act -- every choice semantic not merely musical; direct address to the audience as compositional device; scream not decorative but structural. Most politically precise vocal presence in the engine's final sequence.
theory_nodes.description: Kathleen Hanna -- vocal as political act, scream as structural unit, direct address.

theory_nodes.concept: Tobi Vail and Jigsaw zine as co-founding documents of riot grrrl: Vail's conversations with Hanna about feminist politics and punk contributed directly to riot grrrl formation as named movement. Vail's relationship with Kurt Cobain documented as influence on Nirvana's political consciousness. Drums: direct, forceful, appropriate to energy requirements.
theory_nodes.description: Tobi Vail -- Jigsaw zine, riot grrrl co-founding, Nirvana connection.

theory_nodes.concept: Kill Rock Stars label (Slim Moon, 1991, Olympia): founded to support riot grrrl and adjacent scenes; roster includes Bikini Kill, Sleater-Kinney, Unwound, Elliott Smith; one of three most important PNW independent labels of the 1990s alongside Sub Pop and K Records. Kill Rock Stars as the final three degrees' label context -- the engine's closing label.
theory_nodes.description: Kill Rock Stars -- Slim Moon 1991 founding, roster, engine's closing label.

cross_references.relationship: Kill Rock Stars, Olympia, feminist punk tradition directly influenced by Bikini Kill. Sleater-Kinney takes the musical development further; Bikini Kill is the origin-point. Both E=10.
Same label (Kill Rock Stars), same city (Olympia), different tradition (experimental not riot grrrl). The three final degrees all share the Olympia/KRS context.
Capitol Hill origin of the closing arc (349-353). The engine began at Capitol Hill and closed with the Olympia sequence (357-359). Geographic arc: Seattle → Olympia.

Degrees 355-356 document the Seattle hardcore founding generation (Solger, Fartz). Degrees 357-359 document the Olympia tradition (Bikini Kill, Sleater-Kinney, Unwound). The engine's final six divide between Seattle origin and Olympia conclusion.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=10 + E=10 = E=20. Female authority at operational center. SRKW matriarch's accumulated knowledge organizes the hunt; Kathleen Hanna's precision and urgency organizes the movement. Both maximum-energy structures with female expertise at the center.

final_six_arc: 354 Blood Brothers (Shoreline) → 355 Solger (Seattle) → 356 The Fartz (Capitol Hill) → 357 Bikini Kill (Olympia) → 358 Sleater-Kinney (Olympia) → 359 Unwound (Olympia). The arc moves from suburban/urban Seattle to Olympia for the final three.
